productDetail.chooseOptionsHint: Choose your options above before ordering.

royalSapphireKettle.byline: Curated by Sarar Global design studio
royalSapphireKettle.description: A refined kettle collection piece with sapphire-toned accents and a balanced pour. Designed for daily rituals and quiet countertops, it pairs durable construction with a silhouette that feels at home in both modern kitchens and warm, traditional spaces.
royalSapphireKettle.details: Stainless steel body with heat-resistant handle. Boil-dry protection and wide opening for easy cleaning. Compatible with induction and conventional cooktops where applicable.
royalSapphireKettle.dimensions: Capacity 1.7 L. Overall height 25 cm, base diameter 16 cm. Cord length approximately 75 cm.
royalSapphireKettle.care: Hand wash recommended. Descale periodically with a food-safe kettle descaler. Avoid abrasive pads on exterior finishes.
royalSapphireKettle.sustainability: Packaging uses recycled paper where possible. Designed for longevity to reduce replacement waste.

amberCeramicSet.description: Stackable ceramic forms in a warm amber glaze—made for gatherings that run long and tables that deserve something special. Each piece is finished by hand so subtle variation is part of the charm.
amberCeramicSet.details: High-fire stoneware. Microwave and dishwasher safe unless noted on care card. Set includes coordinated plates and bowls sized for everyday dining.
amberCeramicSet.dimensions: Dinner plate 27 cm, side plate 21 cm, bowl 16 cm diameter × 6 cm height. Weights vary by piece; full set nests for compact storage.
amberCeramicSet.care: Dishwasher safe on a gentle cycle. Avoid sudden temperature shocks. Use wooden or silicone utensils to preserve glaze over time.
amberCeramicSet.sustainability: Glazes formulated to reduce heavy metals. Fired in efficient kilns; durable ware meant to replace single-use serving options.

heritageLinenCover.description: Breathable linen with a relaxed drape and a heritage weave that softens with every wash. Ideal for layering on sofas, beds, or reading chairs when you want texture without fuss.
heritageLinenCover.details: Pre-washed linen blend for reduced shrinkage. Mitered corners and reinforced seams. Natural fibers may show gentle slubs—this is expected.
heritageLinenCover.dimensions: Throw size 130 × 180 cm. Folded depth approximately 6 cm depending on storage.
heritageLinenCover.care: Machine wash cold on delicate. Line dry or tumble dry low. Iron on medium if desired; steam works well for relaxed styling.
heritageLinenCover.sustainability: Linen is a lower-impact fiber versus many synthetics. Designed to age gracefully so you keep—and use—it for years.

cart.title: Your Cart
cart.items: {count, plural, =0 {0 items} one {# item} other {# items}}

checkout.metaDescription: Enter your shipping details and review your order.
checkout.paymentMetaDescription: Choose cash on delivery or pay via bKash or Nagad.
checkout.empty: Your cart is empty. Add items before you can check out.
checkout.paymentStubBody: Choose how you’d like to pay, then place your order.
checkout.paymentCodDescription: Pay when your order arrives at your door.
checkout.paymentMfsDescription: Online payment with bKash or Nagad.
checkout.paymentMfsComingSoonHint: bKash and Nagad checkout will be available soon.
checkout.paymentCodDisabledPrepayment: Cash on delivery is not available for this order — this order requires prepayment.
checkout.paymentMfsPrepayFullDescription: Pay the full order total via bKash or Nagad to confirm your order.
checkout.paymentMfsPrepayDeliveryDescription: Prepay the delivery fee via bKash or Nagad to confirm your order.
checkout.prepaymentRequiredFullBody: One or more items in this order require the full amount to be paid in advance via bKash or Nagad.
checkout.prepaymentRequiredDeliveryBody: One or more items in this order require the delivery fee to be paid in advance via bKash or Nagad.

orderPayment.metaDescription: Submit your payment details to confirm this order.
orderPayment.orderNotFoundHint: We couldn’t find this order. It may have expired or the link is incorrect.
orderPayment.unexpectedBody: This order doesn’t need a payment submission.
orderPayment.formIntroFull: Pay the full order total using the payment details below, then enter your transaction ID to complete your order.
orderPayment.formIntroDelivery: Pay the delivery fee using the payment details below, then enter your transaction ID to complete your order.
orderPayment.amountFullLabel: Full payment required to purchase this order
orderPayment.amountDeliveryLabel: Delivery charge required to purchase this order
orderPayment.instructionsBody: Send the amount above to the store number, then reference order {orderNumber} in your transaction.
orderPayment.errorTransactionLength: Transaction ID must be 100 characters or fewer.
orderPayment.errorPayerLength: Payer number must be 32 characters or fewer.
orderPayment.awaitingBody: Thanks — we’ve received your payment details. The store will verify your transaction and confirm your order shortly.
orderPayment.awaitingEmailHint: We’ll email you as soon as the store confirms your payment. You can safely close this page.
orderPayment.alreadySubmittedMessage: We’ve already received payment details for this order — please wait for the store to verify and email you.
orderPayment.confirmedBody: Your payment has been verified and your order is confirmed. You’ll receive updates as it ships.
orderPayment.rejectedBody: The store was unable to verify your payment, so this order has been cancelled. Please place a new order to try again.
orderPayment.lostSessionBody: We couldn’t load this order’s details in the current browser session. If you’ve already submitted your payment, please wait for the store’s confirmation email.

prepayment.badgeDelivery: Delivery charge is required to purchase this.
prepayment.badgeFull: Full payment is required to purchase this.
